creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
With Xfce >= 4.8.0, this port is no longer necessary (I think). It
works for Xfce >= 4.6.x.

Now as, Thunar (>= 1.1.1) uses GIO and Gvfs, these features are
present by default, provided 'gvfs' is installed (add gvfs in
USE_GNOME variable in x11-fm/thunar/Makefile).

Note: fuse (in devel/gvfs) is not required.

2011/2/12  <miwi@freebsd.org>:
> Synopsis: [NEW PORT] sysutils/gigolo : frontend to connect/mount a remote filesystem
